title: FindingNemo Extraction 4: Circulomics Kit
author: Inswasti Cahyani

steps_raw.instruction: Follow the manufacturer’s instructions as described here .

Store at 4 o C or continue to UL Library Preparation as per Section " Modified ULK001 ". If only SQK-RAD004 is available, follow library preparation as in Section " Modified RAD004 ". 4 °C, for storage

Store at 4 o C or continue to UL Library Preparation as per Section " Modified ULK001 ". If only SQK-RAD004 is available, follow library preparation as in Section " Modified RAD004 ". 4 °C, for storage
This protocol is using the Nanobind CBB Big DNA Kit (see Materials).
Follow the manufacturer’s instructions as described here .

Store at 4 o C or continue to UL Library Preparation as per Section " Modified ULK001 ". If only SQK-RAD004 is available, follow library preparation as in Section " Modified RAD004 " or "KrazyStarFish (KSF) ". 4 °C, for storage
After overnight incubation at room temperature, quantify the DNA as per "UHMW DNA QC" and check homogeneity by calculating %CV values.
